children.text: the procurement of property, other than real property in being;
the procurement of construction, alteration, repair, or maintenance of real property; or

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: With respect to contracts of the Tennessee Valley Authority, this chapter applies only to contracts containing a clause that requires contract disputes to be resolved through an agency administrative process.

children.heading: .—Exclusion
children.label: 2 .—Exclusion
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, this chapter does not apply to a contract of the Tennessee Valley Authority for the sale of fertilizer or electric power or related to the conduct or operation of the electric power system.

children.heading: .—Foreign Government or International Organization Contracts
children.label: c .—Foreign Government or International Organization Contracts
children.text: If an agency head determines that applying this chapter would not be in the public interest, this chapter does not apply to a contract with a foreign government, an agency of a foreign government, an international organization, or a subsidiary body of an international organization.

children.heading: .—Maritime Contracts
children.label: d .—Maritime Contracts
children.text: Appeals under and actions brought under sections 7104(b) and 7107(b) to (f) of this title, arising out of maritime contracts, are governed by chapter 309 or 311 of title 46, as applicable, to the extent that those chapters are not inconsistent with this chapter.section 7107(a) of this title
